data.summary: System health returned the current server, domain, queue, path, and anomaly state.

tool_surface.discovery_expectation_note: This snapshot reflects the repo-side MCP registry only. If it is healthy while an external client shows an empty tool surface, the stale layer is outside this server.

domain_health.reason: System discovery and status tools are registered.

data.recommended_client_action: Use canonical tool names or the normalized /dev_space1/... form exposed by the current client; treat link_* mismatch as an external bridge issue when repo-side dispatch remains healthy.

latest_open_incidents.title: backtests_runs: Broker argument validation failed: backtests_runs

error.message: backtests_runs.starting_capital_usd: '1000' is not valid under any of the given schemas

action.description: Operation to run on this unified backtests tool.
action.title: Action

anchor_timeframe.description: Feature anchor timeframe used by the strategy logic. Currently policy-locked to '1h' — do not use any other value.
anchor_timeframe.title: Anchor Timeframe

auto_complete_work_items.description: Set true to auto-complete all open work items before the run starts (avoids workflow blocking errors for project-bound runs).
auto_complete_work_items.title: Auto Complete Work Items

base_run_id.description: Alias for baseline_run_id retained for agent convenience on compare_summary read views.
base_run_id.title: Base Run Id

baseline_run_id.description: Baseline saved run id used by compare_summary read views.
baseline_run_id.title: Baseline Run Id

before_started_at.description: Only list runs started before this UTC timestamp.
before_started_at.title: Before Started At

branch_id.description: Optional project branch id used for checkpointed writes.
branch_id.title: Branch Id

context_path.description: Optional context override path; usually leave unset unless a non-default context is required.
context_path.title: Context Path

debug_signal_enabled.description: Set true to capture extra signal-debug output for this run.
debug_signal_enabled.title: Debug Signal Enabled

dry_run.description: Set true to inspect lifecycle actions without applying destructive saved-run changes.
dry_run.title: Dry Run

end_at.description: Inclusive UTC end timestamp for the evaluation window.
end_at.title: End At

exact_candles.description: Set true to render charts with exact saved candles instead of compact defaults.
exact_candles.title: Exact Candles

execution_timeframe.description: Execution timeframe used for entries, exits, and fills. Currently policy-locked to '5m' — do not use any other value.
execution_timeframe.title: Execution Timeframe

include.description: Optional extra sections to include in the response.
include.title: Include

include_analysis.description: Set true to include cached analysis previews in run detail output.
include_analysis.title: Include Analysis

include_trades.description: Set true to include trade records in run detail output.
include_trades.title: Include Trades

intent_summary.description: Optional short note describing why this run is being launched.
intent_summary.title: Intent Summary

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to return.
limit.title: Limit

live_chart_enabled.description: Set true to keep live chart payloads updated while the run is active.
live_chart_enabled.title: Live Chart Enabled

on_fail.description: Failure reporting mode to return when the async job does not complete cleanly.
on_fail.title: On Fail

poll_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between status polls while waiting.
poll_interval_seconds.title: Poll Interval Seconds

project_id.description: Optional research project id that should receive checkpoints or lineage.
project_id.title: Project Id

run_id.description: Saved or active backtest run id from `backtests_runs(action='inspect')`.
run_id.title: Run Id

run_ids.description: Optional run id list when inspecting several saved runs together.
run_ids.title: Run Ids

scope.description: Run inventory scope to inspect, such as active, saved, or all.
scope.title: Scope

snapshot_id.description: Snapshot line id from `backtests_strategy(action='inspect')`. Inspect-style reads also accept snapshot refs like `snapshot_id@version`.
snapshot_id.title: Snapshot Id

snapshot_version.description: Deprecated version alias for agent compatibility; canonical callers should use `version`.
snapshot_version.title: Snapshot Version

start_at.description: Inclusive UTC start timestamp for the evaluation window.
start_at.title: Start At

starting_capital_usd.description: Optional starting capital in USD for the run or evaluation.
starting_capital_usd.title: Starting Capital Usd

status.description: Optional lifecycle status filter for listing jobs or runs.
status.title: Status

strategy_snapshot_id.description: Optional snapshot line filter when listing saved or active runs.
strategy_snapshot_id.title: Strategy Snapshot Id

strict_preflight.description: Set true to require strict preflight success before admitting the run.
strict_preflight.title: Strict Preflight

symbol.description: Market symbol to load data for, such as `BTCUSDT`.
symbol.title: Symbol

terminal_logging_enabled.description: Set true to emit operational run logs while the run executes.
terminal_logging_enabled.title: Terminal Logging Enabled

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait before the call times out. Accepts integer or float values.
timeout_seconds.title: Timeout Seconds

trade_limit.description: Maximum number of trades to include when trade data is requested.
trade_limit.title: Trade Limit

ui_streaming_enabled.description: Set true to stream live progress updates to UI-oriented consumers.
ui_streaming_enabled.title: Ui Streaming Enabled

version.description: Immutable snapshot version number for the referenced snapshot line. Accepts integer values directly; numeric strings are normalized with warnings.
version.title: Version

view.description: Response view to load for the selected run, snapshot, or job.
view.title: View

wait.description: How long the tool should wait before returning control.
wait.title: Wait

spec.description: Small preview dataset for broker coverage
spec.name: Coverage Python Target Preview

target.code:
def compute_target(step):
    return 1 if step.current('close') > step.current('open') else 0

data.operating_guidance: Start new sessions with system_bootstrap. Use system_health(validate_tools=true) as the cheap runtime probe. For infrastructure failures follow system_health -> system_debug_validate_path -> system_logs -> incidents(action='capture').
next_recommended_actions: Use system_queue(action='inspect') when queue health looks degraded. For runtime failures, follow system_health(validate_tools=true) -> system_debug_validate_path -> system_logs -> incidents(action='capture').
data.next_action: Use system_queue(action='inspect') when queue health looks degraded. For runtime failures, follow system_health(validate_tools=true) -> system_debug_validate_path -> system_logs -> incidents(action='capture').
